summary: Partial soundboard recording with okay audio captures the historic first live Help>Slip>Frank and a soulful Peggy‑O.
review: The set is missing its opening 45 minutes, but what remains offers solid historical value. Listeners get to hear the debut live performance of the Help>Slip>Frank sequence plus an emotive rendition of Peggy‑O, all presented with acceptable (if not pristine) soundboard quality.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights strong musical moments despite a truncated recording and modest audio fidelity, yielding an overall good rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Partial recording missing the first 45 minutes; sound is described as lacking but still listenable, no major dropouts noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The early portion of the show is absent, but the remaining material flows well and includes historic highlights.
